title: Seven Siblings
content: I'm third of seven kids. Growing up like that, you learn quickly that you have to carve your own path. You can't wait for attention - you go find your thing. For me, it was that Commodore 64.
ssml_content: I'm third of seven kids. <break time="200ms"/>Growing up like that, you learn quickly that you have to carve your own path. You can't wait for attention - you go find your thing. For me, it was that Commodore 64.
